T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 
128 
PRVDR_ZIP_CD 
LABEL: 
Provider Zip Code 
DESCRIPTION: Assigns provider zip code when the address type represents the provider’s billing, practice or service 
location. 
SHORT NAME: PRVDR_ZIP_CD 
LONG NAME: PRVDR_ZIP_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
9 
FILE(S): 
APR Location 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS annual provider TAF 
VALUES: 
Zip code, up to 9 digits 
COMMENT: 
—
